title: lantana viburnoides
intro: Lantana viburnoides, also known as the Mexican box or Mexican shrub, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lantana viburnoides include relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Lantana viburnoides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
